_doc: D3 Phase 0b cheap math filter — V2.1 thresholds. Pure formula-derived classification of Texted-bucket records by current Auto_Approve_v2 / Investor_MAO / Your_MAO / Prev_List_Price state. No live API calls. Reads Airtable cache only. Spec: docs/AKB_Deal_Flow_Orchestrator_Spec.md §V2.1 + Alex 5/13 directive on math-filter-first sequencing.
_alex_directive_5_13: Cheap math filter runs BEFORE market re-verify. Math-fail records exit pipeline without burning RentCast quota. Math-pass-needs-refresh records (Auto_Approve_v2=1 but stale Pricing Agent inputs) are the eligible pool for Phase 0b.5 selective Pricing Agent re-run.

config.auto_approve_spread_floor_note: Investor_MAO - Your_MAO >= $20K → math_pass_auto. Volume strategy, conservative buyer profit cushion.
config.manual_review_spread_floor_note: $10K-$20K spread → math_pass_manual. Worth a look but not auto-fire. Surface to Alex.
config.list_drift_pct_threshold_note: If current List_Price has dropped >=10% from Prev_List_Price, math we ran at Texted-time is stale. Bucket to math_fail_list_drift even if Auto_Approve_v2=1 currently.
config.pricing_input_freshness_hours_note: ARV_Validated_At older than 30 days (720hr) → math_pass_needs_refresh (eligible for Phase 0b.5 Pricing Agent re-run). Fresh inputs + auto-approve → math_pass_auto. RentCast quota budget gates how many needs_refresh records actually get re-run.
